title: Health Dashboard live dev surface
description: Readonly health profile for the public Health Dashboard development surface. The target provides the current live dashboard URL and local worker URLs through health params/runtime state; resolved hostnames and ports are evidence, not user-facing labels.

runLocation.source: worker Bun dashboard gateway with managed Vite dev server

checks.title: Dashboard worker is reachable
checks.repairHint: Restore dashboard worker connectivity or refresh the current worker registration before continuing.

checks.title: Dashboard app directory exists
checks.repairHint: Restore the dashboard app checkout on the current worker or refresh the worker registration before continuing.

checks.title: Dashboard runtime dependency is available
checks.repairHint: Make the dashboard runtime dependency available on the current worker before running the dev server.

checks.title: Dashboard app package is present
checks.repairHint: Restore the dashboard app package metadata in the current checkout before continuing.

checks.title: Dashboard dev server config is present
checks.repairHint: Restore the dashboard dev server config in the current checkout before continuing.

checks.title: Dashboard local dev server is responding
checks.repairHint: Restore the dashboard local dev server behind the worker gateway. The public dashboard tunnel remains the primary user-facing gate.

checks.title: Public dashboard tunnel is running
checks.repairHint: Keep the current dev dashboard public tunnel stable; repair the dashboard gateway or dev server behind it rather than replacing the tunnel hostname.

checks.title: Public dashboard is serving the current app
checks.repairHint: Repair the current worker-served public dashboard URL until it responds successfully and serves the current dashboard app.
